title: Codereview pass 1: MIC verification - compute_mic lacks input validation
description:
**Location:** python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:78-96

**Finding:** compute_mic() does not validate that sender_pubkey is exactly 32 bytes. If a truncated or extended key is passed, HMAC will silently produce a different (wrong) MIC.

**Consequence:** A bug in caller code passing the wrong key length would produce frames that peers reject (fail-closed, not fail-open), but the error would be hard to debug since HMAC doesn't validate key length.

**Recommendation:** Add: `if len(sender_pubkey) != 32: raise ValueError('sender_pubkey must be 32 bytes')`
